name: Hetalia World Meeting

Countries included - America, England, France, China, Japan, Italy, Germany, Russia, Belarus, Ukraine, Estonia, Lithuania, Poland, Latvia, Prussia, Austria, Romano, Canada, Switzerland, The Nordics, Greece, Romania, Belgium
